shipping.description: The following outlines our shipping policy unless otherwise stated in the item listing or an alternative method is agreed upon with the purchaser prior to payment completion.
shipping.policy: Once an order has been successfully placed and completed with payment, the transaction is considered FINAL! We will not add or modify items to an order or shipment once payment is made and being processed by eBay.
shipping.combinedPolicy: Combined Shipping Policy: Buy 10 or more items and pay a flat shipping fee of just $5.00 per order! For orders with fewer than 10 items, standard shipping rates apply ($0.75 per item).

about.description: Geek Sports Cards is an online space dedicated to enthusiasts and collectors of sports cards and memorabilia. We offer a wide range of sports related trading cards and collectables for sale.
about.ebayrating: Top Rated Seller: GeekSportsCards is one of eBay's most reputable sellers. Consistently delivers outstanding customer service
